arts.ttl: Real Madrid climb up to second in LaLiga after seeing off Sevilla
arts.sum: Los Blancos sit one point behind leaders Atletico Madrid and two points clear of third-placed Barcelona, who have played one more game.

arts.ttl: ‘Never seen anything like it’ – Jesús Navas sends thank you message to Real Madrid fans
arts.sum: Spanish football icon Jesús Navas has on Sunday evening moved to reveal his appreciation for both Real Madrid as a club, and the Blancos faithful. This comes after the 39-year-old…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star admits he hit ‘rock bottom’ earlier this season
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has on Sunday provided a fresh insight into the recent struggles which he encountered from a mental standpoint. Frontman Mbappé, for his part, is of…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe pinpoints "rock bottom" moment before hitting straps at Real Madrid
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has endured mixed emotions in his opening months at Real Madrid, missing several big penalties, before clicking into gear as he begins to showcase his class

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Sevilla 2024 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid and Sevilla meet at the Santiago Bernabeu in what will be the last game of the calendar year 2024 for both sides. Los Blancos will be trying to take advantage of Barcelona’s home loss to Atletico de Madrid by earning the three points today, which would place them just one point behind Simeone’s men in the table.

arts.ttl: ‘Rodri saved football’ – Brother of Barcelona star takes aim at Real Madrid’s Vinícius Jr.
arts.sum: The brother of Barcelona star Dani Olmo has on Sunday evening turned heads online. This comes owing to a post on Instagram, in which he aimed a blatant jibe at…

arts.ttl: Vinícius Jr. responds to Kylian Mbappé’s brilliance for Real Madrid vs Sevilla
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinícius Jr. has this evening made known his appreciation for the latest efforts of teammate Kylian Mbappé. This, of course, comes after an outing to remember for…

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe reveals turning point in Real Madrid form
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe has opened up on his improving form at Real Madrid. The France international scored and assisted in Real Madrid’s final game of 2024 as a 4-2 win over Sevilla moves them into second place in La Liga. Mbappe ends 2024 with 10 league goals to his name, after a mixed start in Madrid, […] The post Kylian Mbappe reveals turning point in Real Madrid form appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti: “It is difficult to match a year like this one, but we will try”
arts.sum: He was asked about Real Madrid’s 2024, as well as what they will try to do in 2025, to which he said: “It’s very difficult to match a year like this one. Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media after Real Madrid ’s 4-2 win over Sevilla to end their 2024 on a high.
